parallel_workers.description: How many parallel workers should Task Manager use

tasks.description: The list of things that Task Manager should do in an unordered manner

task_type.description: What kind of task is this?

metadata_file_path.description: The path to the metadata JSON files to load and use in the Input Manager of this task

output_prefix.description: Will be used to generate a name for each of the output files for this task.

log_verbosity.description: Specifies the level of log type to be printed on console.

variable_name_style.description: The formatting option for variable_names.txt file

init_herd.description: Select this flag if you want to initialize the herd by generating a herd population through simulation.

save_animals.description: Choose this flag if you want to save the generated herd data into a JSON file.

save_animals_directory.description: The saving directory for animals if save_animals is set to true

filters_directory.description: The directory for the files containing the output filters

CSV_directory.description: The directory for the csv output files to be saved

output_pool_path.description: The path to a JSON files to load the Output Manager's pool from for post processing

random_seed.description: The random seed, use null value to auto-generate it

multi_run_counts.description: If task type is multi_run, indicates how many single simulations should run.

saltelli_skip.description: The saltelli skip value for Sensitivity Analysis

saltelli_number.description: The saltelli sampling value for Sensitivity Analysis

SA_input_variables.description: The input variables to perform Sensitivity Analysis on

variable_name.description: The name of the variable to be sampled, has to match within Input Manager Pool
